color_sensor.ino.functionality: reads RGB and clear values from the sensor and prints the values to the serial port

gesture_sensor.ino.functionality: detects gestures and prints directional arrows to the serial port based on hand movement

proximity_sensor.ino.functionality: puts the Adafruit APDS9960 sensor in proximity mode, enables the interrupt for proximity threshold, reads proximity data, and prints the value to the serial port
